creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Raimo Niskanen from comment #2)
Could you please also print *vp->v_bufobj.bo_ops and do x/10a vp->v_bufobj.bo_ops ?
Given that the vnode has been through at least once recycle cycle and it is already partially initialized in getnewvnode there is not much of the original data to chew on. 
Thank you!
